title: Nuage Night Cream 50 ml – Face Moisturiser with Squalane & Panthenol – Rich Non-Greasy Hydrating Cream for Normal to Dry Skin – Overnight Nourishment & Care
features: Retinol-Enriched Overnight Care – Formulated with vitamins, squalane, and panthenol, this night cream supports your skin’s natural renewal process while you rest, helping it feel refreshed and well-nourished in the morning

Nourishing Moisture for Normal to Dry Skin – Designed to provide deep hydration overnight, the rich formula helps reduce the feeling of dryness and tightness, leaving skin feeling soft, smooth, and comfortable.

Light, Non-Greasy Texture – Despite its rich ingredients, the texture absorbs easily without leaving a heavy residue, allowing your skin to breathe naturally while delivering long-lasting moisture and comfort
What’s Included – 1 x Nuage Night Cream 50 ml jar
description: Product description Nuage Night Cream provides intensive overnight hydration for normal to dry skin. Its advanced formula, enriched with, vitamins, squalane, and panthenol, helps replenish moisture and support skin’s nightly recovery cycle. The rich yet light texture absorbs quickly without leaving a greasy film, leaving skin feeling soft, smooth, and well cared for in the morning Ingredients Aqua, Paraffinum Liquidum, Petrolatum, Stearyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-25, Cetyl Alcohol, Butylene Glycol, Propylene Glycol, Phenoxyethanol, Glyceryl Stearate, Squalane, Parfum, Isopropyl Palmitate, Octyldodecanol, Carbomer, Triethanolamine, Benzyl Alcohol, Tocopheryl (Vitamin E) Acetate, Panthenol, Retinyl Palmitate (Retinol), Hydroxycitronellal, Isoeugenol, Benzyl Salicylate, Geraniol, Linalool, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Hexamethylindanopyran, Linalyl Acetate, Terpineol Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with clean water. Discontinue use if irritation or redness appears. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Not suitable for application on broken or irritated skin. See more
